start.speaker: The Interpreter
start.text: Welcome, pilgrim. The burden has fallen, but the heart still needs teaching. Walk these rooms slowly; each one names a danger mercy intends to heal.

choices.text: I will look, and let truth search me.
choices.text_zh: 我愿细看，让真理察验我。

choices.text: I am eager to press on, but I will not despise instruction.
choices.text_zh: 我急着赶路，却也不轻看教训。

text_variants.text: Welcome, pilgrim. You nearly drowned in the Slough learning that you cannot lift yourself — and at the Cross the burden fell from a back you had stopped trusting. Good. These rooms will deepen that very lesson.
text_variants.text_zh: 欢迎，朝圣者。你曾在绝望泥潭里几乎沉没，学到了人无法自救；又在十字架前，让重担从一个你已不再倚靠的背上落下。很好。这些房间，要把这一课教得更深。

start.text_zh: 欢迎，朝圣者。重担已经落下，但心仍需教导。慢慢走过这些房间；每一间都点出一种怜悯有意医治的危险。

guide.speaker: The Interpreter
guide.text: Consider the lamp fed in secret, the dust only water can settle, and patience that waits without envy. What you learn here will meet you again on the road.
guide.text_zh: 想想那盏暗中添油的灯、那唯有水才能压住的尘、那不带嫉妒静候的忍耐。你在此所学的，会在路上再与你相遇。
